title: linkia splendens
intro: Linkia splendens, also known as the coral tree, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It is known for its bright orange or red flowers and its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Linkia splendens include tea, infusion, and extract, which can be used to promote health and well-being.
